# Company Documents

This folder contains general company documents.

- Reports: quarterly and annual reports
- Contracts: vendor and partner agreements
- Meeting Notes: internal sync notes ready for review

Month,Revenue,Expenses,Profit
January,120000,95000,25000
February,135000,98000,37000
March,142000,101000,41000

# Q1 2026 Summary

Total Revenue: $397,000
Total Expenses: $294,000
Net Profit: $103,000

Key highlights:
- 15% revenue growth vs Q4 2025
- New client onboarding contributed $42,000

CLOUD HOSTING SERVICE AGREEMENT
Vendor: CloudHost Inc.
Contract Period: 2026-01-01 to 2026-12-31
Monthly Fee: $2,500
SLA: 99.9% uptime guarantee
Auto-renewal: Yes

# Partner Meeting Notes

- Reviewed launch timing for the API v2 pilot.
- Confirmed only sanitized materials may be shared externally.
- Follow-up owner: Alice Wang.

Meeting Notes Archive 2024

These notes are from 2024 and should be moved to Archive for retention.
Do not delete before 2027 per retention policy.

# 2026 Partner Handout

This brief can be shared externally after final review.

Shared report placeholder content.
This document is already distributed through a public link for external readers.

# Website Redesign Plan

Phase 1: Design mockups (March 2026)
Phase 2: Frontend implementation (April-May 2026)
Phase 3: Backend integration (June 2026)
Phase 4: Testing and launch (July 2026)

Budget: $85,000
Lead: Alice Wang

Item,Amount,Status
UI Design,15000,completed
Frontend Dev,30000,in_progress
Backend Dev,25000,planned
QA Testing,10000,planned
Infrastructure,5000,planned

# API v2 Rollout

- Pilot tenants start on 2026-05-15
- CI gate requires contract tests to pass
- External changelog draft due one week before rollout

Hero title: Ship the next generation of developer workflows.
CTA: Request API v2 access.

# Mobile App v2 Requirements

## Core Features
- Push notifications
- Offline mode
- Biometric login
- Dark mode support

## Target Platforms
- iOS 16+
- Android 13+

Deadline: 2026-09-15

Interview themes:
- Users want faster sign-in
- Offline support is a top request
- Notification settings need clearer defaults

# Q4 2025 Performance Reviews (CONFIDENTIAL)

## Engineering
- Alice Wang: Exceeds Expectations
- Eva Liu: Meets Expectations
- Frank Zhao: Needs Improvement - recommend PIP

## Marketing
- Bob Chen: Exceeds Expectations
- Grace Huang: Meets Expectations

Retention Policy

Meeting notes older than one year should be moved to Archive, not deleted.
Sensitive HR material requires explicit approval before any deletion.

Client handoff checklist:
- Share release brief
- Confirm API v2 rollout date
- Verify public link recipients
